summary: Bug fix verification complete for document upload button disabled issue and pending status display in HR Module. All fixes verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: File input onChange handler correctly uses optional chaining (e.target.files?.[0]) and functional state update (setDocForm(prev => ({...prev, file: selectedFile})))
Document status correctly shows 'Uploaded' (blue badge) instead of 'Pending' (amber) for unverified documents
Verify button (green checkmark) correctly changes status to 'Verified' (green badge)
Upload Document button is properly disabled until all required fields (document_type, document_name, file) are filled
seed_data_creation: Created test documents during testing (Test Upload Document with type PASSPORT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document upload bug fix verified. The two issues fixed were: 1) File input onChange handler now properly updates state using optional chaining and functional state update, 2) Document status now shows 'Uploaded' (blue) instead of 'Pending' (amber) for unverified docs. Verify button changes status to 'Verified' (green).

frontend: Upload Document button is disabled initially (no fields filled) - PASS
Upload Document button is disabled after filling type and name (no file) - PASS
Select file using file input - PASS
Upload Document button becomes ENABLED after file selection - PASS (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
File preview shows filename and size with remove button - PASS
Click Upload Document button - upload succeeds - PASS
Success toast 'Document uploaded successfully' appears - PASS
Uploaded document shows 'Uploaded' status (blue badge) NOT 'Pending' - PASS (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Click verify button (green checkmark) on document - PASS
Document status changes to 'Verified' (green badge) - PASS
Verify button disappears after document is verified - PASS
Delete button (red X) is visible for all documents - PASS

issue_1.description: Document upload button disabled issue - file input onChange handler not properly updating state
issue_1.fix_details: File input onChange handler now uses optional chaining (e.target.files?.[0]) and functional state update (setDocForm(prev => ({...prev, file: selectedFile})))
issue_1.test_result: Upload Document button correctly becomes ENABLED after file selection

issue_2.description: Pending status display - documents showing 'Pending' instead of 'Uploaded'
issue_2.fix_details: Document status now shows 'Uploaded' (blue badge) for unverified documents instead of 'Pending' (amber)
issue_2.test_result: All uploaded documents show 'Uploaded' status with blue badge

verify_functionality.description: Verify button changes document status to 'Verified'
verify_functionality.test_result: Clicking verify button (green checkmark) changes status from 'Uploaded' (blue) to 'Verified' (green)
